scripts.build: pnpm --dir ../.. exec tsdown --config tsdown.config.ts --entry modules/api/src/app.ts --entry modules/api/src/server.ts --out-dir modules/api/dist
scripts.test:lint: pnpm --dir ../.. exec biome check modules/api/package.json modules/api/src modules/api/test
scripts.test: pnpm run test:type && pnpm run test:lint && pnpm run build && pnpm --dir ../.. exec vitest run --config vitest.workspace.ts --project api
